---
title: "M3.Ex1: RAG Agent"
format: html
---

## Task 1: RAG with Docling and LangChain

- Reproduce [this example](https://docling-project.github.io/docling/examples/rag_langchain/).
- Notice the use of `HybridChunker`.
- In the "RAG" section, replace `HuggingFaceEndpoint` with a LangChain Model.
- Use LangGraph Functional API Workflow instead of bare procedural code
